candidates.why: Top-line revenue label candidate, but this label appears twice in the sheet and one occurrence is a small negative line, so it is ambiguous as an exact row-label mapping.
Clear total top-line revenue row with values matching the main revenue figure across years.
Expense line, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Profit line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income / loss for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Liability balance, not income statement revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the unambiguous revenue line. Did not include 'Revenues' because that exact label appears multiple times with conflicting meanings in the sheet.

candidates.why: Direct cost line immediately below revenue; best match for COGS.
Overhead/personnel cost component and plausible SG&A component.
Broad overhead bucket; plausible SG&A component but may also contain items beyond SG&A.
Explicit SG&A line; per hierarchy this is preferred when present.
Separate R&D expense above EBIT; should also be included in XSGA_COMPONENTS when not already embedded in chosen SG&A bucket so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD removes it.
R&D-type label but preview is empty and less specific than the explicit R&D expense row.
Balance sheet asset, not period SG&A expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not SG&A expense row.
Balance sheet gross asset, not SG&A expense row.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A row.

variables.notes: OK. CR:c|low|misclassified. Used the explicit SG&A row per hierarchy. Added separate R&D because it appears as a dedicated expense line above EBIT and is not clearly embedded in the selected SG&A row.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; strongest match.

Minority interest allocation of earnings, not financing cost.

Balance sheet payable, not income statement expense.

Equity line, not interest expense.
Too vague and on balance sheet supplemental area, not preferred over explicit income statement interest expense.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit interest expense line and excluded broader finance expense rows to avoid including FX/fair value/non-interest items and to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Hereof attributable to shareholders of the parent company

Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet equity.
